name: Paella (Burke)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the sausages until lightly browned and slice them. Peel and devein the shrimp. Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
2. In a large pan with a lid, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the garlic and cook for 2 minutes until fragrant.
3. Add the chicken to the pan and sauté until lightly browned on all sides. When the chicken is almost cooked through (about 20 minutes), add the sausages and continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Add the lobster tails, shrimp, and cook for another 5 minutes until the seafood is heated through.
5. Stir in the rice and saffron with the remaining liquid. Pour this mixture over the chicken, seafood, and sausages in the pan.
6. Return the lid to the pan and continue cooking on low heat until the rice is tender (about 20-25 minutes). Ensure the mussels open during steaming; discard any that remain closed.
7. Serve hot with additional olive oil if desired.
